description: Build ArticleCard React component for ARES dashboard. Display individual article from Firestore 'articles' collection with error boundary. Props: {article}. Export default.
requirements: Handle Firestore Timestamp: article.publishedAt.seconds * 1000 for date formatting
Tailwind dark theme: gray-800/700/600 palette, rounded-xl, hover effects
Match ProjectCard styling pattern and structure
Props: {article} (object with title, author, tags, publishedAt)
context: Reference src/app/dashboard/components/ProjectCard.js for styling patterns. ArticleCard should be consistent with it but for article data.
